entities.name: Coordinator
entities.context: Orchestration component that manages workers, identifies issues, and spawns fix workers to resolve blockers

entities.name: Worker
entities.context: Execution units (W1, W2, W3) that handle individual tasks and can be spawned or resumed by the coordinator

entities.name: Integration Conflict
entities.context: Situation where workers have conflicting assumptions (e.g., error format) requiring coordinator intervention

entities.name: Blocking
entities.context: State where a worker cannot proceed due to missing dependencies like missing model fields

entities.name: Task.priority
entities.context: A model field that can be added to resolve worker blockers

relationships.context: Coordinator spawns, resumes, and manages workers to handle tasks and fixes
Coordinator identifies integration conflicts between workers and spawns fix workers
Coordinator detects blocked workers and spawns targeted fixes to unblock them
Workers can enter blocked state when dependencies are missing
